rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §21.0444 governs temporary teacher certification for military service members and first responders. The provisions address entirely unrelated subject matters with no intersection.
quote: This section applies to a person seeking certification to teach career and technology education who:
_note: No conflict. The rule text addresses educator certification and has no connection to property tax homestead exemption amounts.
